testcase.name: test_backend_r2_conversion_logic

failure.message:
AssertionError: Matricula should match assert '270-8920' == 'TEST-MAT-001'
- TEST-MAT-001 + 270-8920

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_r2_bug_fix.py:290: in test_backend_r2_conversion_logic assert r2.get('matricula_inmobiliaria') == test_r2_data['matricula_inmobiliaria'], \ E AssertionError: Matricula should match E assert '270-8920' == 'TEST-MAT-001' E E - TEST-MAT-001 E + 270-8920
